posts.title: Movement for Business Purpose
posts.summary: Movement for Business Purpose: entrepreneurs who create new ventures with both a declared sense of purpose and who live it through their strategy and policies have a significant impact on multinationals—their bigger brothers. The movement for business purpose is not organized, it is organic. The entrepreneurs creating the movement for business purpose are not even […] The post Movement for Business Purpose appeared first on Venture Founders .
posts.author: Will Keyser
